description: Discussion on the importance of ZK VMs in enhancing blockchain applications, particularly on Solana. The speakers introduce their companies and explain how ZK technology can improve scalability and performance in decentralized applications.
topic_summary: The panel discusses ZK VMs and their role in building scalable blockchain applications, focusing on Solana. They highlight the need for ZK technology to enhance performance, verifiability, and user experience in decentralized finance.
